##RRUFFID=R070178

##LOCALITY=Coyote Peak, Orick, Humboldt County, California, USA
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Brownish black with submetallic luster, associated with bartonite. Note that this is co-type material for bartonite, but there is very little bartonite on this piece.
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R070178

##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.447 b: 10.447 c: 20.615 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 2250 crystal system: tetragonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=532
